nl_query: Which boards have a board coordinator who is also listed as a primary evaluator in the pool, and what is the total number of scripts that coordinator has evaluated versus coordinated?
failed_sql:
SELECT b.id, b.name, COUNT(CASE WHEN ea.attempt_type = 'PRIMARY' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS num_primary_evaluations, COUNT(CASE WHEN ea.attempt_type = 'BOARD_COORDINATOR' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS num_board_coordinations, COUNT(CASE WHEN ea.attempt_type = 'PRIMARY' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0 / COUNT(CASE WHEN ea.attempt_type IN ('PRIMARY', 'BOARD_COORDINATOR') THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS primary_evaluations_percentage, COUNT(CASE WHEN ea.attempt_type = 'BOARD_COORDINATOR' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0 / COUNT(CASE WHEN ea.attempt_type IN ('PRIMARY', 'BOARD_COORDINATOR') THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS board_coordinations_percentage
FROM   board b
JOIN   board_coordinator bc ON bc.board_id = b.id
JOIN   faculty_cache fc ON fc.employee_id = bc.employee_id
JOIN   evaluator_pool ep ON ep.board_id = b.id AND ep.eligible_role = 'PRIMARY' AND ep.is_available = TRUE
LEFT JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.board_id = b.id AND ea.evaluator_user_id = fc.employee_id
GROUP BY b.id, b.name
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): board.academic_unit_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
